query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(entity_name, 'unknown') AS "server_name!",
            COALESCE(action, 'unknown') AS "action!",
            COALESCE(description, '') AS "description!",
            created_at AS "created_at!"
        FROM user_activity
        WHERE category = 'mcp_access'
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
        LIMIT 20
